hook: Physical confidence is often quieter than men imagine.
body: The strongest physical presence usually feels composed, patient, and attentive rather than hurried or performative.

hook: Trying to escalate on a timetable can make the whole interaction feel less attractive and less safe.
body: Move from responsiveness, not from pressure or checklist thinking.

hook: Move from responsiveness, not from pressure or checklist thinking.
body: A patient pause with mutual eye contact can create more real charge than rushing to manufacture a milestone.

body: Slow down enough to notice whether the moment is becoming more mutual or more strained.
